## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Cody Carmen to GrowthX's content creation processes and strategies for Prophecy.io](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX uses Airtable to manage content workflow, from ideation to publication](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Content strategy focuses on job-to-be-done (JTBD) and topics rather than solely keywords](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [GrowthX is incorporating Prophecy's webinar content and seeking additional SME input to enrich articles](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1029.0)
  - [Prophecy is shifting focus from data engineering to include data preparation, requiring strategy adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)

## Topics

### Airtable Workflow Overview

  - [Statuses: Proposed, Review for Following Weeks, Scheduled, Creating Article, Client Review, Edited Meets for Review, Publishing Queue, Published](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Collaborative process between GrowthX and Prophecy for topic selection and content refinement](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Additional statuses for special cases (e.g., needs data to sign off, needs SME input)](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Content Research and Creation Process

  - [Initial topics derived from JTBDs identified during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Keyword research using tools like Semrush to identify gaps and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [AI-powered research flow gathers topic information from various sources](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
  - [Human review ensures Prophecy's narrative is incorporated](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Recent addition: Incorporating content from Prophecy's webinars to enrich articles](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### SEO and Content Strategy

  - [Focus on JTBD and topics rather than specific keywords](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Aim to create content that addresses customer pain points and Prophecy's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Balance between SEO-driven content and bottom-funnel content for sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Ongoing adaptation to SEO trends and Google algorithm updates](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

### Collaboration and Feedback

  - [GrowthX team open to feedback and pushback on proposed topics](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Desire for more input on sales team questions and customer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [Possibility of including sales team members in future calls for direct input](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody to dig deeper into sales enablement and content usage this week](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1442.0)
  - [Matt and Cody to discuss shift towards including data preparation topics in tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1682.0)
  - [GrowthX team to receive more context on new positioning and customer pain points](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Consider sharing sanitized customer call transcripts to provide deeper insights into customer needs](https://fathom.video/share/F-iPmiuB67p7tyrkwe6vx2z1cxsAaSQn?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)
